module.name: no-parent-imports
module.description: Disallow parent-directory imports ('..'' and '../*') in import declarations, import expressions, require calls, and import-equals declarations.

scenarios.name: should allow a same-directory relative import
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should allow a package/module import
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should allow a parent import in a barrel index file
scenarios.given: import { foo } from '../module' inside an index.ts file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because barrel files are exempt

scenarios.name: should report an import using '../' prefix in a non-index source file
scenarios.given: import { Bar } from '../bar' in a non-barrel source file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should report the bare '..' parent path
scenarios.given: import something from '..' in a non-index file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import declaration

scenarios.name: should report a dynamic import() with a parent path
scenarios.given: await import('../module') in a non-index file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the import expression
